text:
Most people think automation means "set and forget." It's really "set and improve."

The loop: post → check what landed → feed that data back into tomorrow's content. That's what compounds. Not more posts. Better posts.

I built this with free tools and Meta's official API. One afternoon of setup. Now every day the system learns and writes sharper. Yesterday's analytics shape today's output.

The grind isn't posting. It's ignoring your own data.
